testcase.name: PIM
testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.TimeoutException: Expected condition failed: waiting for element to be clickable, but the element was not found: org.openqa.selenium.NoSuchElementException: Unable to locate element: //span[text()='PIM']. testcase.name: addCandidates
